---
title: "Contact"
subtitle: "Let's Connect"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

I'd love to connect! Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.

---

- 📧 **Email:** contact@saurabhp.com
- 💼 **LinkedIn:** [saurabh-parate](https://linkedin.com/in/saurabh-parate)
- 🌐 **Website:** [saurabhp.com](https://saurabhp.com)
- 📞 **Phone:** (840)-243-8505
